chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-1313 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 5 a/w reply as at A 2. For hearing of main case 09.12.2025 Mrs. Razia Ali Zaman Patoli, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Saleem Mastoi, advocate for the respondent No.5 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Mastoi, AAG a/w SHO Thatta Majid Korai and SHO Golarchi Anwar Leghari --------- Pursuant to the Court’s notice, alleged detainee Anam has been produced before this Court by her parents. Her statement was recorded by SHO concerned, wherein she has stated that she intends to go with her parents and she has filed Suit for Jactitation of Marriage against petitioner Ghulam Shabbir. She further submits that she has no apprehension or danger to her life at the hands of her parents. Learned counsel for the petitioner contends that it was a marriage of freewill. The alleged detainee has remained with her parents and she is under pressure, therefore, she may be lodged in Darul Aman so that she may record statement with fresh mind. Learned counsel for the petitioner was allowed to meet with alleged detainee, wherein she has replied in the same manner as she has recorded in her statement. Since alleged detainee has appeared before the Court and stated that she is not illegally confined and she has filed Suit for Jactitation of Marriage, therefore, this petition having served its purpose is disposed of. However, the petitioner is at liberty to pursue the Suit for Jactitation of Marriage before the Family Court and may file appropriate proceedings.

Since alleged detainee has appeared before the Court and stated that she is not illegally confined and she has filed Suit for Jactitation of Marriage, therefore, this petition having served its purpose is disposed of. However, the petitioner is at liberty to pursue the Suit for Jactitation of Marriage before the Family Court and may file appropriate proceedings. JUDGE Nadir*
